turns.query: Analyze the impact of Hebei Zongheng Group Fengnan Steel Co., Ltd. (company_id: 2467) emissions on nearby air quality monitoring stations on 2025-06-10 at 18:00.
turns.actual_response:
2025年6月10日18:00，河北纵横集团丰南钢铁有限公司排放情况如下：烟气量为29,767,800立方米，NOx为242.789千克，SO₂为61.66千克，颗粒物为56.298千克。

该企业10公里范围内共有2个空气质量监测站，但该时刻仅1个站点有有效监测数据。该有效站点位于企业3—5公里范围内，处于侧风向位置；当时10公里范围内平均风速为2.3米/秒，来风方向约为223°，污染物理论输送方向约为43°。因此，现有有效站点并不位于主要下风向输送通道上，对企业排放影响的捕捉能力有限。

该有效近场站点监测结果为：AQI 50，PM2.5 20，PM10 50，SO₂ 9，NO₂ 22，CO 0.3，O₃ 69。与同城10—30公里背景站点均值相比，近场站点AQI低2.4%，PM2.5低22.8%，NO₂低15.9%，CO低37.1%，PM10持平；SO₂高42.7%，O₃高24.2%。

综合判断：该时刻没有观测到企业周边近场站点出现整体空气质量恶化或颗粒物、NO₂、CO同步升高的现象。SO₂在近场站点明显高于背景水平，提示该企业或周边工业源可能对局地SO₂有一定贡献，但由于有效近场站点仅1个且位于侧风向，不能据此单独确认企业排放造成了明确下风向影响。当前证据更支持“局地SO₂偏高、整体空气质量影响不显著、下风向监测证据不足”的结论。

监管建议：应重点补充企业东北向约43°输送方向上的下风向监测覆盖，尤其是在3—10公里范围内布设或调用移动监测；同时加强该企业SO₂排放控制设施运行核查，并结合连续多小时排放、风场和下风向站点数据进行追踪分析，以提高源影响判定的可靠性。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd, numpy as np
from sqlalchemy import text

target_ts = "2025-06-10 18:00:00"
company_id = 2467

# 1) 企业位置与目标小时排放；并存储规定变量
em_q = text("""
SELECT pc.id, pc.name,
       ST_X(pc.coordinate::geometry) AS lon, ST_Y(pc.coordinate::geometry) AS lat,
       hpce.exhaust_gas, hpce.nox, hpce.so2, hpce.pm
FROM polluting_company pc
LEFT JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission hpce
  ON hpce.company_id = pc.id AND hpce.timestamp = :ts
WHERE pc.id = :cid
""")
company_em = pd.read_sql(em_q, engine, params={"cid": company_id, "ts": target_ts})
if company_em.empty:
    raise ValueError("未查询到指定企业。")
row = company_em.iloc[0]
company_lon, company_lat = float(row["lon"]), float(row["lat"])
flue_gas_1800 = float(row["exhaust_gas"]) if pd.notna(row["exhaust_gas"]) else None
nox_1800 = float(row["nox"]) if pd.notna(row["nox"]) else None
so2_1800 = float(row["so2"]) if pd.notna(row["so2"]) else None
pm_1800 = float(row["pm"]) if pd.notna(row["pm"]) else None

# 2) 10公里内站点数量（无论目标小时是否有数据）
station_count_q = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id = :cid
WHERE ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 10000)
""")
stations_within_10km = int(pd.read_sql(station_count_q, engine, params={"cid": company_id}).iloc[0]["n"])

# 3) 大表先计数：10公里内目标小时站点读数
reading_count_q = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id = :cid
JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id = aqs.id
WHERE h.timestamp = :ts AND ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 10000)
""")
near_reading_count = int(pd.read_sql(reading_count_q, engine, params={"cid": company_id, "ts": target_ts}).iloc[0]["n"])

# 4) 10公里内站点目标小时读数与方位距离
near_q = text("""
SELECT aqs.id AS station_id, aqs.name AS station_name,
       ST_Distance(aqs.coordinate, pc.coordinate) AS distance_m,
       degrees(ST_Azimuth(pc.coordinate::geometry, aqs.coordinate::geometry)) AS bearing_deg,
       h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2, h.co, h.o3
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id = :cid
JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id = aqs.id
WHERE h.timestamp = :ts AND ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 10000)
ORDER BY distance_m
LIMIT 200
""")
near_df = pd.read_sql(near_q, engine, params={"cid": company_id, "ts": target_ts})

# 5) 背景对照：同城10-30公里站点目标小时读数，先计数后聚合
bg_count_q = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.city_id = aqs.city_id AND pc.id = :cid
JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id = aqs.id
WHERE h.timestamp = :ts
  AND ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 30000)
  AND NOT ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 10000)
""")
bg_count = int(pd.read_sql(bg_count_q, engine, params={"cid": company_id, "ts": target_ts}).iloc[0]["n"])

bg_q = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n,
       AVG(aqi) AS aqi, AVG(pm2_5) AS pm2_5, AVG(pm10) AS pm10, AVG(so2) AS so2,
       AVG(no2) AS no2, AVG(co) AS co, AVG(o3) AS o3
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.city_id = aqs.city_id AND pc.id = :cid
JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id = aqs.id
WHERE h.timestamp = :ts
  AND ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 30000)
  AND NOT ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 10000)
""")
bg_df = pd.read_sql(bg_q, engine, params={"cid": company_id, "ts": target_ts})

# 6) 10公里内网格风场聚合，用于判断可能输送方向
wind_count_q = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n
FROM hourly_grid_wind w
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id = :cid
WHERE w.timestamp = :ts AND ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 10000)
""")
wind_count = int(pd.read_sql(wind_count_q, engine, params={"cid": company_id, "ts": target_ts}).iloc[0]["n"])

wind_q = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n, AVG(wind_speed) AS avg_wind_speed,
       degrees(atan2(AVG(sin(radians(wind_degree))), AVG(cos(radians(wind_degree))))) AS mean_from_deg
FROM hourly_grid_wind w
JOIN polluting_company pc ON pc.id = :cid
WHERE w.timestamp = :ts AND ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, pc.coordinate, 10000)
""")
wind_df = pd.read_sql(wind_q, engine, params={"cid": company_id, "ts": target_ts})
if not wind_df.empty and pd.notna(wind_df.iloc[0]["mean_from_deg"]):
    wind_from = float(wind_df.iloc[0]["mean_from_deg"]) % 360
    plume_to = (wind_from + 180) % 360
else:
    wind_from, plume_to = np.nan, np.nan

def angle_diff(a, b):
    return abs((a - b + 180) % 360 - 180)

if not near_df.empty and not np.isnan(plume_to):
    near_df["transport_sector"] = near_df["bearing_deg"].apply(lambda x: "下风向" if angle_diff(x, plume_to) <= 45 else ("上风向" if angle_diff(x, wind_from) <= 45 else "侧风向"))
else:
    near_df["transport_sector"] = "无法判定"

polls = ["aqi","pm2_5","pm10","so2","no2","co","o3"]
near_summary = near_df[polls].agg(["count","mean","max"]).round(3) if not near_df.empty else pd.DataFrame()
sector_summary = near_df.groupby("transport_sector")[polls].agg(["count","mean","max"]).round(3) if not near_df.empty else pd.DataFrame()
band_summary = pd.DataFrame()
if not near_df.empty:
    near_df["distance_band"] = pd.cut(near_df["distance_m"], bins=[0,3000,5000,10000], labels=["0-3公里","3-5公里","5-10公里"], include_lowest=True)
    band_summary = near_df.groupby("distance_band", observed=True)[polls].agg(["count","mean","max"]).round(3)

bg_vals = bg_df.iloc[0].to_dict() if not bg_df.empty else {}
comparison = {}
if not near_df.empty and bg_count > 0:
    for p in polls:
        nv, bv = near_df[p].mean(), bg_vals.get(p)
        if pd.notna(nv) and pd.notna(bv) and bv != 0:
            comparison[p] = {"near_mean": round(float(nv),3), "background_mean": round(float(bv),3), "near_minus_bg": round(float(nv-bv),3), "percent_diff": round(float((nv-bv)/bv*100),1)}
comparison_df = pd.DataFrame(comparison).T

print("企业与排放：", {"企业": row["name"], "时间": target_ts, "烟气量": flue_gas_1800, "NOx": nox_1800, "SO2": so2_1800, "PM": pm_1800})
print("监测覆盖：", {"10公里内站点数": stations_within_10km, "目标小时有读数站点数": near_reading_count, "10-30公里背景读数站点数": bg_count, "10公里内风场网格数": wind_count})
print("风场摘要：", {"平均风速": None if wind_df.empty or pd.isna(wind_df.iloc[0]["avg_wind_speed"]) else round(float(wind_df.iloc[0]["avg_wind_speed"]),3), "来风方位角": None if np.isnan(wind_from) else round(wind_from,1), "污染物理论输送方位角": None if np.isnan(plume_to) else round(plume_to,1)})
print("10公里内站点污染物统计：")
print(near_summary)
print("按输送方位分类统计：")
print(sector_summary)
print("按距离分组统计：")
print(band_summary)
print("10公里内均值相对10-30公里同城背景对照：")
print(comparison_df)
